scene_title: Serafim de seis asas em julgamento
narrative_beat: Serafim dourado apontando para cidade P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid six-winged seraph in blazing gold and incandescent white with arm extended pointing downward in judgment pose in foreground
subject.focal_point: the seraph's extended arm pointing in judgment
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern metropolis seen from distance with tiny skyscrapers under vast sky, dramatic swirling storm clouds in crimson and amber tones

lighting.key_light: harsh dusk glow from storm clouds

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber-crimson highlights, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: divine judgment descending on technological civilization

symbolism.primary: the seraph as heavenly prosecutor of the beast system
symbolism.secondary: downward pointing arm as sentence already declared

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
